query:
SELECT  p.id          AS "id!: Uuid",
                p.key         AS "key!: String",
                p.archived_at,
                pm.role       AS "actor_role?: String"
        FROM    projects p
        LEFT JOIN project_members pm
               ON pm.project_id = p.id AND pm.user_id = $2
        WHERE   p.id = $1 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
